title: Linkind GU5.3 MR16 LED Bulbs, 12V AC/DC 5W (Equivalent to 50W) Bi-Pin Base Spotlight Bulb, 520LM, Daylight White 5000K, 36°Beam Angle Track Light, Non-dimmable, Pack of 5
features: 【NON-DIMMABLE GU5.3 Bulb】 Designed for standard on/off 12V circuits, these MR16 LED bulbs deliver consistent, flicker-free light every time. Not compatible with dimmer switches or dimmable drivers — if your current fitting has a dimmer, please switch to a standard on/off circuit before installing.

【12V LED TRANSFORMER REQUIRED】 Engineered for 12V AC/DC LED-compatible transformers only. Not compatible with old magnetic halogen transformers — using one will cause flickering or failure. If upgrading from halogen MR16s, please confirm your transformer is LED-compatible or replace it with a 12V LED driver first.
【5000K DAYLIGHT WHITE – FOR TASK & DISPLAY LIGHTING】 Clean, bright and crisp Ideal for kitchens, retail displays, art galleries and workspaces where accurate colour and strong visibility matter.

【5W REPLACES 50W HALOGEN 】 Standard GU5.3 bi-pin, 50×45mm — fits most 12V recessed and track light fittings. 520LM, CRI≥80 for vivid colour rendering. Save over 90% on energy with a rated 15,000-hour lifespan.

【CE CERTIFIED | MERCURY FREE | WIDE APPLICATION】 Safe and easy to install into any 12V LED-compatible transformer circuit. Suitable for recessed downlights, track lighting, kitchens, corridors, hotels, restaurants, galleries and offices.
description: Product Description Things to know before buying Previous page Next page Previous page Stable light for eye comfort and perfect photos Next page 1 5000K Daylight 2 CRI > 80 3 Flicker-Free Previous page Why Choose Linkind? Next page 1 High Quality 2 LED VS Halogen 3 Upgraded Energy Label Previous page Next page 1 Office 2 Shop 3 Living room Can I use these bulbs with my existing halogen transformer? No. These bulbs require a 12V AC/DC LED-compatible transformer. Old magnetic halogen transformers are not compatible and will cause flickering or failure. Please replace your transformer with a 12V LED driver before installing. Are these bulbs dimmable? No, these are non-dimmable. Using them with a dimmer switch or dimmable driver will cause flickering and may damage the bulb. Please use with a standard on/off circuit only. What does 5000K look like? Is it very blue? 5000K is cool daylight white — clean and crisp, not blue. Brighter and sharper than warm white (2700K) or neutral white (4000K). Best for kitchens, workspaces and display lighting. For a warmer glow, choose our 2700K or 3000K range. Will these fit my existing MR16 downlight fittings? These use a standard GU5.3 bi-pin base (5.3mm pin spacing), 50mm diameter × 45mm length — a direct replacement for most MR16 halogen spotlights. If you have a non-standard housing, please measure before ordering.

specifications_table.Accepted Voltage Frequency: 100 to 240 Volts and 50 Hertz to 60 Hertz
